expected_violation.rule: integrity.signature present requires signature_algorithm, key_id, and key_purpose (arp-envelope allOf if-then)

note: integrity has signature present but signature_algorithm/key_id/key_purpose are missing, violating the allOf if-then conditional in arp-envelope.schema.json. content_hash and signature are structural; 结构示例，非密码学有效证据.
